text:
The Oath in the Tunnel is the 48th episode of Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood.

Episode Cards

 
Eyecatch48-1.jpeg|Eyecatch #1
 

Episode Notes

This episode is adapted from content in Chapter 87: An Oath Made in the Underground.
The Transmutation Circle that appears in the background of this episode's title card is Roy Mustang's flame alchemy circle.
Once again, the Adult Swim broadcast cut out the post-ending segment of Mustang and his gang hijacking Mrs. Bradley from her car.
